import io
import string
import list

fn main() -> Unit
  let line = match io.read_line()
  when Some(s)
    s
  when None
    ""
  end
  let tokens = string.split_whitespace(line)
  let n = tokens.len()
  mut sorted = true
  mut i = 1
  mut prev = 0
  if n >= 1
    let first = tokens.get(0)
    match first
    when Some(t)
      match string.parse_int(t)
      when Some(v)
        prev = v
      when None
        sorted = false
      end
    when None
      sorted = false
    end
  end
  while i < n
    let tok = tokens.get(i)
    match tok
    when Some(t)
      match string.parse_int(t)
      when Some(v)
        if v < prev
          sorted = false
        end
        prev = v
      when None
        sorted = false
      end
    when None
      sorted = false
    end
    i = i + 1
  end
  if sorted
    println("YES")
  else
    println("NO")
  end
end
